1.value:
SELECT 'DIM_GCTS_OPTION' AS TEST_TYPE, s.CNT AS SOURCE, t.CNT AS TARGET
FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT
    FROM (
        SELECT *
        FROM ${ev_database_10_staging}."STG_GCTS"."V_GCTS_OPTIONS"
        WHERE _ETL_ACTIVE_FLAG = True
    )
    
) s
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNT
    FROM ${ev_database_30_presentation}."PL_MARKETRESEARCH"."DIM_GCTS_OPTION"
    WHERE DIM_GCTS_OPTION_KEY NOT IN ('-1', '-2')
) t

UNION ALL

SELECT 'DIM_GCTS_OPTION_DUPLICATE', COUNT(*) AS SOURCE, 0 AS TARGET
FROM (
    SELECT DIM_GCTS_OPTION_KEY , COUNT(DIM_GCTS_OPTION_KEY ) AS A
    FROM ${ev_database_30_presentation}."PL_MARKETRESEARCH"."DIM_GCTS_OPTION"
    GROUP BY DIM_GCTS_OPTION_KEY 
    HAVING COUNT(DIM_GCTS_OPTION_KEY ) > 1
)

UNION ALL

SELECT 'DIM_GCTS_QUESTION' AS TEST_TYPE, s.CNT AS SOURCE, t.CNT AS TARGET
FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNT
    FROM ${ev_database_10_staging}."STG_GCTS"."V_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP"
    WHERE _ETL_ACTIVE_FLAG = TRUE
) s
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNT
    FROM ${ev_database_30_presentation}."PL_MARKETRESEARCH"."DIM_GCTS_QUESTION"
    WHERE DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY NOT IN ('-1', '-2')
) t

UNION ALL

SELECT 'DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_DUPLICATE', COUNT(*) AS SOURCE, 0 AS TARGET
FROM (
    SELECT DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY, COUNT(DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY) AS A
    FROM ${ev_database_30_presentation}."PL_MARKETRESEARCH"."DIM_GCTS_QUESTION"
    GROUP BY DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY
    HAVING COUNT(DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY) > 1
)

UNION ALL

SELECT 'FACT_GCTS_RESPONSE' AS TEST_TYPE, s.CNT AS SOURCE, t.CNT AS TARGET
FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNT
    FROM ${ev_database_10_staging}."STG_GCTS"."V_GCTS_RESPONSE"
    WHERE _ETL_ACTIVE_FLAG = True
) s
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNT 
    FROM ${ev_database_30_presentation}."PL_MARKETRESEARCH"."FACT_GCTS_RESPONSE"
) t

UNION ALL

SELECT 'FACT_GCTS_RESPONSE_DUPLICATE' AS TEST_TYPE, COUNT(*) AS SOURCE, 0 AS TARGET
FROM (
    SELECT DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY, DIM_GCTS_OPTION_KEY, ID, COUNT(DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY, DIM_GCTS_OPTION_KEY, ID) AS A
    FROM ${ev_database_30_presentation}."PL_MARKETRESEARCH"."FACT_GCTS_RESPONSE"
    WHERE (DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY NOT IN ('-1', '-2')) AND (DIM_GCTS_OPTION_KEY NOT IN ('-1', '-2'))
    GROUP BY DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY, DIM_GCTS_OPTION_KEY, ID
    HAVING COUNT(DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY, DIM_GCTS_OPTION_KEY, ID) > 1
)

test_result_list = context.getGridVariable('gv_unit_test')

for result in test_result_list:
  source_result = result[1]
  target_result = result[2]
  test_name = result[0]
  if source_result == target_result:
    print(f"Test {test_name} passed with value source: {source_result} vs target:{target_result}")
  else:
    print(f"Test {test_name} NOT passed with value source: {source_result} vs target:{target_result}")
    context.updateVariable('jv_test_pass','FALSE')
Filter Source Objects Based on Run Group

7528376.text: Due to issues with too many tables being run concurrently and a max of 5000 data items that can be returned the parent job batches the source objects into run groups. These are iterated through and therefore it should only pass the source objects for the run group required.

definition.name: jv_handle_schema_drift_flag
definition.description:
This variable will control whether the stage table will automatically be refactored to handle schema drift. For example, if a new column has been added to the Load Table then the Stage Table will be automatically refactored to also include the additional column.

If you want this to be enabled then enter 'true' (default is 'false').

definition.name: jv_version_load_stage_layer
definition.description: The revision of the shared job that is being run. Used to add comments against objects created so that we know what version of the Shared Job was used to create it.

1.value:
###
# Variables are directly accessible: 
#   print (myvar)
# Updating a variable:
#   context.updateVariable('myvar', 'new-value')
# Grid Variables are accessible via the context:
#   print (context.getGridVariable('mygridvar'))
# Updating a grid variable:
#   context.updateGridVariable('mygridvar', [['list','of'],['lists','!']])
# A database cursor can be accessed from the context (Jython only):
#   cursor = context.cursor()
#   cursor.execute('select count(*) from mytable')
#   rowcount = cursor.fetchone()[0]
###

# It would be too much to run all tables at once, therefore we need to create batches of tables to put into the loading
# This is set by the lv_batch_size parameter

la_source_objects = context.getGridVariable('gv_source_objects')
lv_batch_size = 8
lv_batch_counter = 1
lv_run_group = 1
la_source_objects_run_group = []
la_run_group = [['1']]

# Loop through source objects and assign the run group in batches of 8
for object in la_source_objects:
  la_object = object.copy()

  # Add the run group number to all tables grouped into batches of 8
  if lv_batch_counter <= lv_batch_size:
    lv_batch_counter = lv_batch_counter + 1
  else:
    lv_batch_counter = 2
    lv_run_group = lv_run_group + 1
    la_run_group.append([str(lv_run_group)])
    
  # Add the run group to the object record
  la_object.append(str(lv_run_group))

  # Add the object with its run group to the grid variable
  la_source_objects_run_group.append(la_object)

  print('Object: ' + str(la_object))

context.updateGridVariable('gv_source_objects_run_group', la_source_objects_run_group)
context.updateGridVariable('gv_run_group', la_run_group)
print (context.getGridVariable('gv_run_group'))

print (context.getGridVariable('gv_source_objects_run_group'))

7528371.text: Due to issues with too many concurrent tables, we batch the tables here using the run group field. We then iterate through run groups to load that batch of tables.

definition.name: gv_source_objects_run_group
definition.description: Grid variable holding source metadata with the run group that they will use to load the data.

###
la_data_objects = context.getGridVariable('gv_source_objects')
lv_target_object = ''
lv_source_object = ''
lv_target_schema = ''
lv_source_schema = ''

for index, object in enumerate(la_data_objects):
  
  # On first iteration there should be no OR clause
  lv_database = object[0]
  lv_source_schema = object[1]
  lv_source_object = object[2]
  lv_track_changes = object[3].upper()
  lv_compare_columns = object[4]

if lv_source_schema == 'LOAD_UUSS':
  lv_target_schema = lv_source_schema.replace('LOAD_','STG_',1)
else:
  lv_target_schema = lv_source_schema.replace('STG_LOAD_','STG_',1)
  
lv_target_object = lv_source_object.replace('T_LOAD_', 'T_')
lv_delete_object = lv_source_object.replace('T_LOAD_', 'T_DELETE_')

lv_columns = str(lv_compare_columns.upper().split(','))[1:-1]

context.updateVariable('jv_source_database', lv_database)
context.updateVariable('jv_target_database', lv_database)
context.updateVariable('jv_source_schema', lv_source_schema)
context.updateVariable('jv_source_object', lv_source_object)
context.updateVariable('jv_target_schema', lv_target_schema)
context.updateVariable('jv_target_object', lv_target_object)
context.updateVariable('jv_track_changes', lv_track_changes)
context.updateVariable('jv_compare_columns', lv_compare_columns)
context.updateVariable('jv_columns', lv_columns)
context.updateVariable('jv_delete_object', lv_delete_object)

print(jv_compare_columns)
print(jv_columns)
#PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTE
Create queries to delete and insert records

###
# Variables are directly accessible: 
#   print (myvar)
# Updating a variable:
#   context.updateVariable('myvar', 'new-value')
# Grid Variables are accessible via the context:
#   print (context.getGridVariable('mygridvar'))
# Updating a grid variable:
#   context.updateGridVariable('mygridvar', [['list','of'],['lists','!']])
# A database cursor can be accessed from the context (Jython only):
#   cursor = context.cursor()
#   cursor.execute('select count(*) from mytable')
#   rowcount = cursor.fetchone()[0]
###
select_condition = []

if (jv_varchar_columns != None):
  compare_columns = jv_varchar_columns.split(',')
  # Create the WHERE condition dynamically based on the varchar columns
  where_conditions_1 = " AND ".join([f"\n NVL(STG.{col},'^^') = NVL(LOAD.{col},'^^')" for col in compare_columns])
  select_condition.extend(compare_columns) 

if (jv_non_varchar_columns != None):
  compare_columns = jv_non_varchar_columns.split(',')
  # Create the WHERE condition dynamically based on the other datatype columns
  where_conditions_2 = " AND ".join([f"\n STG.{col} = LOAD.{col}" for col in compare_columns])
  select_condition.extend(compare_columns) 
  
print(select_condition)
select_condition_str = ", ".join(select_condition)
print(select_condition_str)

if (jv_varchar_columns != None):
  if (jv_non_varchar_columns != None):
    where_conditions = where_conditions_1 + 'AND' + where_conditions_2
  else:
    where_conditions = where_conditions_1
elif (jv_non_varchar_columns != None):
  where_conditions = where_conditions_2
# Insert matching rows into the new table (table_new)
select_query = f"""
SELECT STG.*
FROM {jv_target_database}.{jv_target_schema}.{jv_target_object} STG
INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT {select_condition_str}, MIN(_ETL_LOAD_DATETIME) as _ETL_LOAD_DATETIME FROM {jv_source_database}.{jv_source_schema}.{jv_source_object} GROUP BY ALL) LOAD ON {where_conditions}
AND STG._ETL_LOAD_DATETIME < LOAD._ETL_LOAD_DATETIME
"""
##AND TO_CHAR(STG._ETL_LOAD_DATETIME) != TO_CHAR(LOAD._ETL_LOAD_DATETIME)


# Delete matching rows from table S
delete_query = f"""
DELETE FROM {jv_target_database}.{jv_target_schema}.{jv_target_object} STG
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT * FROM (SELECT DISTINCT {select_condition_str}, MIN(_ETL_LOAD_DATETIME) as _ETL_LOAD_DATETIME
    FROM {jv_source_database}.{jv_source_schema}.{jv_source_object} GROUP BY ALL) LOAD
    WHERE {where_conditions} 
    AND STG._ETL_LOAD_DATETIME < LOAD._ETL_LOAD_DATETIME
    
)
"""

    
print("Select Query:", select_query)
print("Delete Query:", delete_query)

context.updateVariable('jv_sql_string_1', select_query)
context.updateVariable('jv_sql_string_2', delete_query)
Find the varchar & non varchar column

WHERE TABLE_NAME = '${jv_source_object}'
  AND TABLE_SCHEMA = '${jv_source_schema}'
  AND COLUMN_NAME in (${jv_columns})

import boto3

processed_file_list = context.getGridVariable('gv_processed_file')
print(processed_file_list)

# Establishing Connection with S3
s3_client = boto3.client('s3')
bucket_name = jv_s3_path.split('/')[0]


if processed_file_list:
  for file in processed_file_list:
    s3_client.delete_object(Bucket=bucket_name, Key=f'{file[1]}')
    print('Deleting file ' + bucket_name + '/' + file[1] + ' for table ' + file[0])
Get the list of source files

/* Note: this query will be run as a subquery for the purposes of sampling the data.
   As such it will be restricted by any subquery limitations specified by the current platform. */
with stg as (
   SELECT 
  '${ev_database_10_staging}' as database,
  'STG_LOAD_' || "ETL_SOURCE_CODE" as schema,
  'T_LOAD_' || "ETL_SOURCE_CODE" || '_' || "SOURCE_TABLE" as object,
   DATA_TYPE,
   TRACK_CHANGES
   FROM "${ev_database_50_framework}"."${ev_schema_metadata}"."STG_DATA_OBJECTS_SOURCE" where
   "ETL_SOURCE"='${jv_record_source}' 
   AND SOURCE_TABLE = '${jv_table_name}'
   AND _ETL_ACTIVE_FLAG='TRUE'
),
md as (
  select TABLE_NAME as OBJECT, ROW_COUNT from ${ev_database_10_staging}.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES where ROW_COUNT > 0)
select stg.* from stg inner join md using (OBJECT)

source_object_list = context.getGridVariable('gv_source_objects')

full_query_list = []
full_query_string = ''
for obj in source_object_list:
  stage_schema = obj[1].replace('STG_LOAD_','STG_',1)
  stage_table = obj[2].replace('T_LOAD_','T_',1)
  table_name = '_'.join(stage_table.split('_')[2:])
  query = f"select distinct '{table_name}' as table_name, ocdi_source_file_name from {obj[0]}.{stage_schema.replace('STG_','STG_LOAD_',1)}.{stage_table.replace('T_','T_LOAD_',1)} where ocdi_source_file_name is not null"
  full_query_list.append(query)
  
full_query_string = ' UNION ALL '.join(full_query_list)
print(full_query_string)
context.updateVariable('jv_get_file_list_query', full_query_string)

1.value: Add Load Layer Metadata - Load Table

table_column_list = context.getGridVariable('gv_table_column_list')
table_column_list.sort(key=lambda x: int(x[3]), reverse = False)
context.updateGridVariable('gv_table_column_list',table_column_list)

context.updateVariable('jv_load_schema_name',f'STG_LOAD_{jv_source}')
context.updateVariable('jv_load_table_name',f'T_LOAD_{jv_source}_{jv_table_name.upper()}')

print(jv_s3_path)
print(jv_s3_prefix)
print(table_column_list)

cursor = context.cursor()
print("list @{} PATTERN='{}'".format(jv_child_external_stage_name,jv_s3_prefix))
cursor.execute("list @{} PATTERN='{}'".format(jv_child_external_stage_name,jv_s3_prefix))
result = cursor.fetchall()
file_list = []
for row in result:
  file_name = str(row[0].split('/')[-1])
  file_list.append([file_name])

context.updateGridVariable('gv_external_stage_file_list', file_list)
Grid Iterator - external stage file list

import json
table_information_dict = json.loads(jv_table_information)
table_information = table_information_dict.get('table_information',{})

table_list = []
table_column_list = []
for table in table_information:
  position = 1
  table_name = table['table_name']
  s3_prefix = table['s3_prefix']
  if table_name not in table_list:
    table_list.append([table_name, s3_prefix])
   
  for col in table['table_columns']:
    table_column_list.append([table_name,col['column_name'],col['column_type'], str(position), col.get('column_json','')])
    position += 1
print(table_column_list)
print(f'Number of tables: {len(table_list)}')
print(table_list)

context.updateGridVariable('gv_table_list',table_list)
context.updateGridVariable('gv_table_column_list', table_column_list)
context.updateVariable('jv_source',jv_source.upper())

context.updateVariable('jv_load_stage_per_file', 'TRUE' if jv_load_stage_per_file == '' or jv_load_stage_per_file is None or jv_load_stage_per_file.upper() not in ('TRUE','FALSE') else jv_load_stage_per_file.upper())

context.updateVariable('jv_file_type',table_information_dict.get('file_type','csv'))
print(jv_file_type)

if jv_file_type == 'csv':
  csv_config = table_information_dict.get('csv_config',{})
  delimiter = csv_config.get('delimiter',',')
  header = csv_config.get('header','1')
  context.updateVariable('jv_file_config',f'{{"delimiter":"{delimiter}","header":"{header}"}}')
  print(jv_file_config)
  
delete_source_file_flag = table_information_dict.get('delete_source_file_flag','')
if delete_source_file_flag is None or delete_source_file_flag == '' or delete_source_file_flag.upper() not in ('TRUE','FALSE'):
  context.updateVariable('jv_delete_source_file_flag', 'TRUE')
  print('Delete source file flag is not defined properly, by default will be set as TRUE')
else:
  context.updateVariable('jv_delete_source_file_flag', delete_source_file_flag.upper())
  print('Delete source file flag is set as', jv_delete_source_file_flag)

16832269.text:
**Variable that must be configured**

**THIS IS TEMPLATE JOB, PLEASE DO NOT CHANGE ANYTHING**
If it needs to be adjusted, please contact paulusindra.salim@sampoerna.com

16832271.text:
``**jv_s3_path**``
Put the s3_path including the bucket name, without "s3://".
The job will scan all of the files inside the folder.
Example: 
env-bucket-name/folder1/folder2/

16832272.text:
``**jv_source**``
The name of the source that you want to process.
Put the same name like you put in SOURCE for Ingestion Metadata

16832273.text:
**jv_load_stage_per_file**

Option: TRUE/FALSE

Let's say you have more than 1 files in the folder.
If you want to run the Load Stage Layer for each file, set it to TRUE
If you want to run the Load Stage Layer after all the files appended to LOAD table, set it to FALSE

16832274.text:
**jv_external_stage_name**

Optional.

By default, Matillion will use the cross-account mechanism.
But if it's not possible to use the cross-account mechanism, and source's can only provide IAM user key / assume role, you need to create the External Stage first to connect to the S3 bucket in Staging Database under STG_COMMON_LAYER schema. Then put the External Stage name here.
If empty, it will automatically use the cross-account mechanism.

1.value: CSV - Default - Load data to Raw Load table

import json

if jv_child_file_type == 'csv':
  file_config = json.loads(jv_child_file_config) if jv_child_file_config != '' and jv_child_file_config is not None else {}
  context.updateVariable('jv_delimiter',file_config.get('delimiter',',') if file_config else ',')
  context.updateVariable('jv_header',file_config.get('header','1') if file_config else '1')
  print('Delimiter:',jv_delimiter)
  print('Header:',jv_header)
  
if jv_child_sub_folder is None:
  context.updateVariable('jv_child_sub_folder','')
if jv_child_base_folder is None:
  context.updateVariable('jv_child_base_folder','')
if jv_file_name is None:
  context.updateVariable('jv_file_name','')
print('Base Folder:', jv_child_base_folder)
print('Sub Folder:', jv_child_sub_folder)
print('File Name:', jv_file_name)

print('Combine File Name')
context.updateVariable('jv_file_name',jv_child_base_folder+jv_child_sub_folder+jv_file_name)
print('Final file name:', jv_file_name)
CSV - External Stage - Load data to Raw Load table
JSON - External Stage - Load data to Raw Load table
Join - filter scmqy available in max file
Rank - first response of latest id

1.value:
CASE
	WHEN country='TEST' THEN 'Other Countries'
	WHEN country='Bosnia & Herz.' THEN 'Bosnia and Herzegovina'
	WHEN country='Canary Islands' THEN 'Other Countries'
	WHEN country='Korea' THEN 'South Korea'
	WHEN country='Kosovo' THEN 'Republic of Kosovo'
	WHEN country='Montenegro' THEN 'Republic of Montenegro'
	WHEN country='Russia' THEN 'Russian Federation'
	WHEN country='Serbia' THEN 'Republic of Serbia'
	WHEN country='Slovak Republic' THEN 'Slovakia'
	WHEN country='Spain Mainland' THEN 'Spain'
	WHEN country='PRC' THEN 'China'
	WHEN country='Palestine Auth. Area' THEN 'Palestine'
	WHEN country='UAE' THEN 'United Arab Emirates'
	WHEN country='TEST1' THEN 'Other Countries'
	WHEN country='Japan(LA-69)' THEN 'Japan'
	WHEN country='Turkish Cyprus' THEN 'Other Countries'
	WHEN country='Pakistan Urban' THEN 'Pakistan'
	WHEN country='Iraq' THEN 'Iraq'
	WHEN country='Saudi Arabia Female' THEN 'Saudi Arabia'
	ELSE country
END
Generate DIM Keys & Data Type Transformation

case when len(week) = 6 and week::number > 53 and left(week,2) = '20' then
	IFNULL(  YEAR( DATEADD(week, right(week,2)::number, TO_DATE("YEAR"||'-01-01'))) * 10000 + 
       MONTH( DATEADD(week, right(week,2)::number, TO_DATE("YEAR"||'-01-01'))) * 100 + 
       DAY( DATEADD(week, right(week,2)::number, TO_DATE("YEAR"||'-01-01'))) , -2)::number
when week::number < 53 and week::number > 0 then
	IFNULL(  YEAR( DATEADD(week, week, TO_DATE("YEAR"||'-01-01'))) * 10000 + 
       MONTH( DATEADD(week, week, TO_DATE("YEAR"||'-01-01'))) * 100 + 
       DAY( DATEADD(week, week, TO_DATE("YEAR"||'-01-01'))) , -2)::number
when "YEAR" is not null and "MONTH" is not null then
	("YEAR"*10000 + "MONTH" * 100 + 1)::number
else -2
end

CASE
	WHEN ("VARIABLEID" is null or "COUNTRYCATEGORYID" is null)  THEN '-2' --we do not have value in main source file
	WHEN "DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY" is null THEN '-1' --we do not have proper value in dimension
	ELSE "DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY"
END

CASE
	WHEN ("VARIABLEID" is null or "COUNTRYCATEGORYID" is null or "RESPONSENAME" is null) THEN '-2' --we do not have value in main source file
	WHEN "DIM_GCTS_OPTION_KEY" is null THEN '-1' --we do not have proper value in dimension
	ELSE "DIM_GCTS_OPTION_KEY"
END

CASE
	WHEN "COUNTRYCATEGORYID" is null THEN '-2' --we do not have value in main source file
	WHEN "DIM_COUNTRY_KEY" is null THEN '-1' --we do not have proper value in dimension
	ELSE "DIM_COUNTRY_KEY"
END

TO_DOUBLE(CASE WHEN "D_WEIGHT2" = '' then null else "D_WEIGHT2" end)::double
